_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: I'm America's number one selling diuretic! I flush out excess water, reduce bloating, and support weight loss — naturally!

frame.MrWilly_pose: standing right of frame, arms open in surprised amused reaction, eyebrows raised, big smile
frame.MrWilly_expression: genuinely surprised and impressed, open and warm
frame.Xpel_pose: standing on table left of frame, both tiny arms stretched wide open excitedly, chest puffed out
frame.Xpel_expression: maximum excitement, huge smile, proud eyes
frame.camera_angle: medium two-shot, eye level, both characters visible

camera_motion.movement: very slow subtle zoom out to show both characters more fully

character_motion.MrWilly: natural breathing, slight lean back in surprise, arms open wider as Xpel speaks, single blink
character_motion.Xpel: tiny arms wave enthusiastically side to side, slight bounce on feet, no spinning, no glowing
